name: Sensory Activity
description: Gentle sensory suggestions to engage your senses calmly.
technical_summary: Provides sensory activity suggestions based on user favorite_singer preference. Templates support variable substitution.
suggestions: Todays suggested activity: Have a warm cup of tea and listen to {singer}.
Take a moment to smell the lavender or vanilla lotion in your bathroom.
Rub a soft, fuzzy blanket between your hands and enjoy the warmth.
Listen to the birds singing outside your window. Can you count how many you hear?
Feel the texture of your favorite sweater. What memories does it bring back?
Take three slow, deep breaths. Notice how calm your body feels.
Run cool water over your hands and feel it flow between your fingers.
Close your eyes and listen to your favorite song by {singer}. Hum along if you like.
Smell a fresh orange or lemon. Does it remind you of anything?
Feel the warmth of sunlight coming through the window on your skin.
